proposed.boundary_rules: If the main focus is the technical, scientific, or technological aspect (such as product features, malfunctions, new devices, research, or innovation), assign Sci/Tech—even if business impacts, finance, or companies are discussed. If the core of the story is financial results, business strategies, market moves, or the economic impact of company decisions (not the technical details), assign Business—even if technology or science is mentioned. For stories about scientific research or technical issues affecting society or nature, favor Sci/Tech unless the emphasis is on economic or international policy impacts. If a story could be either World or Sci/Tech, assign World only if the focus is on geopolitical events or societal/global issues without a clear technological or scientific emphasis.
